prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 6.0L Jaguar AJ6 inline-6 (engine code: AJ6-6000) with a fully built version featuring forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.500" lift) for high-RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (86mm compressor wheel) with a custom Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and a Precision Turbo 50mm external blow-off valve. Use a custom air-to-water intercooler from PWR with a 3.5L capacity and a Bosch 044 fuel pump to support 1,000+ HP targets.

Drivetrain: Swap the stock ZF 5HP24 5-speed automatic for a reinforced ZF 6HP28X 6-speed automatic with a custom valve body tune from Level 10 Motorsports. Upgrade the differential with a Quaife ATB helical LSD and replace the half-shafts with custom CV axles from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" chromoly).
estetica: Aero: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit from Prior Design (PD670RS), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust exits. Add a custom front splitter with adjustable canards from APR Performance.

Wheels: Fit 19x10.5" ET15 front and 19x12" ET20 rear BBS LM-R wheels in gold with custom center caps featuring the XJR-6 logo. Use Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear) for track-focused grip.

Interior: Replace the stock leather with a full Alcantara retrim from Royal Steering Wheels, including a custom XJR-6 embroidered headliner. Install a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada with a custom XJR-6 logo startup screen and a Sparco Pro 2000 seat with 6-point harnesses.
